## Summary

Describe the change you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain the operator or workflow value.

## Scope

What should be included?

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

Note privacy, cost, reliability, or complexity concerns.

## Notes

Add related links, examples, or implementation ideas if useful.
